name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Bhagayega Billi
desc: Dr Hathi and Komal wake up to realise that Goli is missing from the house. Abdul prevents Bhide from entering the clubhouse where Pom Pom is kept hidden by Tapu Sena.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Billi Ka Darr
desc: Everyone at Gokuldham society is worried about the situation caused by the cat. Goli sneaks out in the middle of the night to check on Pom Pom.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji's Cat Allergy
desc: With Popatlal hell-bent on getting rid of the cat, Tapu Sena comes up with a plan to save her. Popatlal suggests that they use Bapuji as a cat detector to find Pom Pom.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ke Andar Ka Sher
desc: In the light of recent events, Popatlal forces Bhide to resign from the post of secretary. Everyone tries to calm Bhide and Popatlal, who won't stop fighting.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Billi Ka Problem
desc: A worried Abdul tells Taarak and Anjali that Pom Pom, the kitten, has scared away Popatlal's guests. Tapu Sena hides her at their clubhouse. What will happen when Popatlal finds out?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Abb Ladka Dekhne Nahi Jaa Sakte
desc: With Abdul on their side, Tapu Sena celebrates Pom Pom staying at the clubhouse. Later, the family that arrives at Gokuldham Society, to meet Popatlal, refuses to step any further after Pom Pom crosses their path.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Abdul's Hunt For The Kitten
desc: Bhide questions Goli, Gogi and Sonu as they return to the clubhouse. Later, Goli tries to keep Abdul deviated, as he searches the clubhouse for the cat. Will Abdul find out about Pom Pom?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Box Hil Raha Hai
desc: Tapu scares Bhide, who entered the clubhouse while Goli, Gogi and Sonu try to sneak out a few items from their respective houses for Kitty. Will Tapu Sena succeed in hiding Kitty?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Billi Ne Kiya Nuksaan
desc: Bhide and the other society members get annoyed at the fact that a cat was causing destruction to property in the colony and they look for the elusive cat. Meanwhile, the children of the society decide to let Kitty go before the adults get angry.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu's Plan For Kitty
desc: Tapu Sena is looking for Kitty, but she is nowhere to be found. Tapu comes up with a plan to keep Kitty in the society, which involves convincing Bhide. Will Bhide get convinced?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bad News Hain
desc: Goli's parents do not allow keeping Kitty at their house. Tapu and Sonu go to Popatlal's house with hopes. Will he keep Kitty at his house?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – House For Kitty
desc: Tapu Sena struggles to find a house for Kitty. They contemplate taking it to their house but are worried about how their parents will react. Will they find a house for Kitty?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – A New Tappu Sena Member
desc: Gogi and Goli find a lost and homeless kitten in the park. With no other option in mind, they decide to take the kitten home for its safety. What will happen now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Apologises To Bhide
desc: Popatlal apologises to Bhide in order to seek help regarding his KYC. Later, inspite of being asked to return home early by his mother, Goli takes several detours with Gogi.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Aur Popatlal Ki Ladai
desc: Popatlal and Bhide argue with each other over garbage issues in society. Bhide plays a prank on Popatlal which angers him and he decides to take his revenge.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bagha's Attempt To Create A Diversion
desc: All the male members of the Gokuldham Society remain disheartened because of their failed plans. Later, Champaklal is on the verge of finding out about Jethalal's party sharty.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Aur Risk Nahi Le Sakte
desc: The men of Gokuldham Society flee their party set up on the pavement when they hear the siren of a police car. The dejected men return to join the Mahila Mandal at their party.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Yeh Chappal Jethia Ki Chappal Jaisi Hai
desc: Champaklal confronts the male members of the society after hearing the commotion caused by Sodhi and Popatlal. With nowhere else to go for the party-sharty, Sodhi comes up with an idea, but will this plan work out?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Ka Popat
desc: The men get excited and share poetry to get their party started. All their hopes go down the drain when Jethalal drops and breaks the bottle. Will they have the party that they worked so hard for?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Ka Maza
desc: Jethalal manages to sneak into Popatlal's house so they can begin their party. The Mahila Mandal sends an important video message to their husbands, who decided to party separately.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Is Fed Lies
desc: Jethalal lies to Bapuji and leaves for Popatlal's home to attend the party. However, Bapuji catches Jethalal in the society with the bottle of alcohol. Will the boys be able to party in peace?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Sharty Ki Taiyari
desc: With everyone's wives permitting them to join the party, Jethalal orders an expensive bottle for them to enjoy. Now, the only thing that remains is Bapuji's permission.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mehfil-E-Jaam Mein Jaane Ki Ijaazat
desc: Jethalal returns to his godown being the bearer of bad news that Anjali has denied Taarak permission to attend the party. Taarak decides to call his beloved wife to get her permission in a different way. Will Jethalal and the gang get to celebrate his success together?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mission Permission Ka Teesra Padhav
desc: Jethalal calls Bhide to tell him that Madhvi has permitted him to have a night out. However, everyone gets worried as Jethalal has to request Roshan and Babita, who are known to be very strict. Will mission permission be a success?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Mission Permission
desc: Jethalal returns to the society early so he can take permission from Komal and Madhvi for the party. Will he manage to convince them to allow their husbands for a night out?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Location Fixed
desc: Popatlal agrees to host Jethalal's success party at his flat but puts forward a condition. Everyone tries to find a way to convince their wives to allow them for a boys' night out.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Kab Aur Kaha Hogi
desc: Jethalal and Bagha prepare the godown to welcome his Gokuldham friends. Soon, everyone arrives at the godown to discuss when and where to organise Jethalal's success party.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ki A1 Soch
desc: Wow Resort's manager reveals that he was testing the kind of businessman Jethalal is and finalises the deal. Jethalal takes all his friends on a conference call to give them the good news.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ki Imandari
desc: The members of Gokuldham, worried about Jethalal, call to check on him. Jethalal's meeting with the Wow Resort's manager goes south when he puts forward an unreasonable demand.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Party Confirmed
desc: Bagha calls Jethalal to the godown early, so nothing goes wrong in their meeting. With time in their hands, Jethalal, Taarak and Sodhi decide to have a lavish breakfast.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – More Orders For Gada Electronics
desc: Babita informs Jethalal that her friend will visit his shop later. Jethalal promises his friends a party after he finalises a new deal that is coming his way.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ka Important Email
desc: Bagha calls Jethalal to inform him that they failed to read their work emails today. However, Bagha fails to relay the message which makes Jethalal lose his mind.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Order Mila Bapuji Ki Wajah Se
desc: Mr Goyal gets extremely happy to spend time with Bapuji and tells Jethalal that he will be given all the orders. The men of the Gokuldham Society meet at the soda shop and discuss who amongst them should leave the society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Welcomes The Client
desc: Jethalal and Bhide rush back to Gokuldham to check if Bapuji returned home. Jethalal comes back to the godown to find Bapuji and his client having a good time.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Harr Disha Se Museebat
desc: Bapuji fails to find Bagha in the meeting spot and goes looking around for him. Bagha finds Bhide, who gets fined again for breaking the traffic rules while searching for Bapuji.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sakharam Gets Stopped By The Police
desc: Bhide and Bapuji get in trouble when a lady gets hit by Sakharam. Jethalal starts getting anxious as he can't enter the godown, and the time for his meeting ticks closer.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Aur Jethalal Ka Miscommunication
desc: Jethalal reaches his godown to find that Bapuji is waiting with the keys in the Gokuldham Society. Bhide agrees to help by offering to drive Bapuji to the godown.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Godown Ki Chaabi
desc: Bagha and Jethalal arrive at the godown early in the morning only to realise that they do not have the keys to the door. Jethalal reaches home and finds out that Bapuji isn't there. Will Jethalal reach his godown in time?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Sleepless Night
desc: Anxious about his client meeting, Jethalal has trouble falling asleep. He takes his father's blessings and meets his Gokuldham friends before leaving for his godown.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Preparation For A Potential Client
desc: Bagha helps Jethalal get rid of the stiffness in his body by helping him stretch. They decide to decorate the godown, to make it presentable for hosting an important client meeting.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Makes Things Right
desc: To redeem Gokuldham's image, Popatlal tells everyone that he wants to publish the truth about Taarak. Anjali reminds her husband that he has to deal with his boss, whom he spooked earlier.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Anjali Is Heartbroken
desc: The Choodi Wale Baba reveals that it was just an act that he performed as directed by Anjali. The members of the Gokuldham Society help Taarak and Anjali to solve their diet problem.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak's Scam
desc: Taarak sends everyone in shock when he reveals that he has been acting all along. Bapuji accuses Jethalal of being an accomplice in Taarak's drama. Taarak apologises to everyone for fooling them over the last few days.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bottle Khul Chuki Hai
desc: The Baba claims that Madhavi is now hosting the spirit of Suryamukhi. He later explains to everyone how he is going to exorcise the ghost inside Taarak.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Baba Ki Rasmein
desc: The 'Choodi Wale Baba' performs his rituals to exorcise the ghost inside Taarak. Taarak and Tapu Sena struggle to find a way out from the mess they have gotten themselves in.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Baba Bhagayega Bhoot
desc: Bhide lies to his customers, neighbours and students to keep the news of Taarak's 'bhoot' coming out. Choodi Wala Baba makes his preparations to help exorcise the ghost inside Taarak.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Fears The Shock Treatment
desc: Tapu Sena tries to convince Bhide and Bapuji to stop the Baba from coming to Gokuldham. The Mahila Mandal visits the Mehtas to support them by getting some food for Taarak.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Meeting For Taarak's Health
desc: All members of the Gokuldham Society meet to find a solution for Taarak's condition. After the psychiatrist fails to help, Babita suggests taking help from a Baba.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Psychiatrist For Taarak
desc: Taarak sees a cart carrying 'karela' into the Gokuldham Society and loses his composure. Dr Hathi calls a psychiatrist to help with Taarak's condition. What is wrong with Taarak?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak's Day Off
desc: Anjali calls Taarak's boss and asks him to give her husband the day off. The dietician arrives at Gokuldham Society to check on the Mehtas.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Karele Ka Kuan
desc: Tapu Sena and Taarak enjoy their moment of victory by having some delicious food. As Anjali prays to god to help her family, Taarak worries that soon his lies will be caught.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Celebrates With Tapu Sena
desc: The Mahila Mandal, worried about Taarak, asks Anjali to give him his favourite delicacies till he gets better. Taarak celebrates with Tapu Sena after their plan succeeds.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Mein Bhoot Ka Darr
desc: Everyone leaves for their home after Taarak has a good homecooked dinner and takes his medicine. The ghost story told by Taarak gives birth to fear in everyone's mind. How will the members of Gokuldham Society overcome their fears?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Karele Ka Bhoot
desc: The Mahila Mandal joins forces to help Anjali take care of Taarak. An eerie vibe takes over Gokuldham as everyone starts having visions of a ghost in the society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Karele Wali Ki Jaan
desc: Taarak comes to his senses when he hears the mention of 'karela'. He narrates the story of the 'karela wali' he met on his way home.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Found In A Kabristan
desc: All members of the Gokuldham Society put their heads together to find Taarak. Taarak arrives late in the night in a rickshaw from a cemetery. What was he doing at the cemetery?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Gets Tired Of His Diet
desc: Taarak tries to seek everyone's help to find better food without Anjali finding out about it. Anjali gets worried when Taarak does not return home in time.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak's Special Tiffin
desc: Jethalal asks for more time when Taarak calls him seeking help to quench his appetite for delicious food. Taarak's boss forces him to exchange tiffins so he can get out of eating diet food.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Doesn't Like His Surprise
desc: Anjali reveals her surprise and gets into a fight with Taarak in Jethalal's presence. Goli feels responsible for the fight between the Mehtas and meets Taarak to apologise to him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Diet Plan Shuru
desc: After having a delicious meal cooked by Anjali, Taarak meets his friends at the soda shop. The next day Anjali surprises Taarak and Jethalal with a special halwa.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Khiladi Diet Plan
desc: Anjali takes the help of Mahila Mandal with her husband's diet problem. Babita takes Anjali to a reputed dietician, who suggests a 'Khiladi Diet' for Taarak.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Goli's Secret Mission
desc: After feeling betrayed, Anjali decides to spy on Taarak. She bribes Goli to click a picture of Taarak eating in a hotel during his lunch break. Will Goli, the spy, accomplish his mission?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Anjali Finds The Bills
desc: Jethalal brings a hot breakfast for his friends and invites them to his house. Anjali finds a hotel bill amongst Taarak's things and seeks Babita's help to find answers.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ki Sherwani Hai
desc: Popatlal reveals that it was his sherwani, which angers other members of the society. Taarak throws a badminton challenge to Anjali hoping to eat the best street food.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Getting Rid Of The Sherwani
desc: All the members of the Gokuldham Society get angry at Popatlal for throwing his sherwani on Bhide. When Bhide calls to confront him about his behaviour, Popatlal asks Bhide to get rid of the sherwani.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Giving The Sherwani Away
desc: Popatlal, happy about getting rid of his cursed sherwani, is surprised by his pandit, who delivers his sherwani back to him. Popatlal appoints Tapu Sena to gift his sherwani to an unmarried guy.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Meets A Vastu Expert
desc: Popatlal explains to Bhide, Madhvi and Komal the reason for his happiness. Popatlal welcomes Sanjana, a Vastu expert, to the Gokuldham Society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Toofani Astrologer
desc: Popatlal, already on the edge, sends a family home, who genuinely came with a marriage proposal. Fuming with anger, he calls his boss and asks him about the astrologer who works for their paper.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – No Shaadi For Popatlal
desc: Both families leave Gokuldham Society, revealing that they just wanted to invite the members of the Gokuldham Society to Sneha and Gungun's wedding. A furious Popatlal is calmed down by the Mahila Mandal with their optimism.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gungun's Father Faints
desc: It appears as Popatlal has made up his mind to marry Sneha, but when he declines Gungun's proposal, Gungun's father loses consciousness. How will this change Popatlal's selection criteria?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Meets Sneha And Gungun
desc: Popatlal uses a ladder to get up and down Bhide's balcony to meet both families. Who will Popatlal choose, Sneha or Gungun?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Do Rishton Mein Phasa Popatlal
desc: Popatlal drops the second family at Dr Hathi's house and meets Gungun, who is waiting at Bhide's house. Popatlal has to juggle between the two families before coming to a decision.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ke Liye Do Rishte
desc: Popatlal takes it upon himself to disinfect his house so he can meet Gungun. He gets in trouble when another family stops him on his way to Bhide's house.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham's Eligible Partner
desc: Shubh Mangal Marriage Bureau tells Popatlal that after his appearance on KBC, he has become the most eligible bachelor in the country. Abdul calls Popatlal to inform him that someone is coming over to see him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Yuva Unstoppable Foundation At Gokuldham
desc: The members of the Gokuldham Society return home after their gameplay on the hot seat and congratulate each other. Everyone welcomes the people from Yuva Unstoppable Foundation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – KBC Se Invitation
desc: Asit Ji announces that Gokuldham Society members have been invited to participate in Kaun Banega Crorepati. The society members can't control their excitement at the thought of participating in such a huge show and meeting Big B personally.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldham Ke Liye Khushkhabri
desc: With Asit Kumarr Modi arriving in Gokuldham Society, what news is he bringing along with him, that has the interest of all the members?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – An Invitation From Big B
desc: Big B calls Asit Kumarr Modi and invites every member of the Gokuldham Society to play KBC. Asit relays the message to Bhide so he can inform everyone to get ready.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide's Confession And Punishment
desc: Sonu recites the poem she wrote for her Mama and Mami. Bhide confesses that it was him who burned Madhvi's saree.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mama Mami Ka Swagat
desc: Bhide and his family finally welcome Madhvi's brother to their house. Everyone notices that Madhvi's saree is different. Will Bhide come clean?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Gets The Saree
desc: Bhide buys a replica of Madhvi's Saree from a shop. He sneaks in with the saree and hides it in the cupboard.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Goes Saree Shopping
desc: Bhide tries to find the same saree at the shops in the mall. Meanwhile, Madhvi calls Bhide, asking him about her saree.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Looks For A New Saree
desc: A tailor suggests to Bhide that the best option he has is to buy the same saree. Bhide asks Taarak to help him find the saree.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Gets Caught
desc: Bhide is in a hurry to leave, but the people of Gokuldham keep coming in his way. Bhide has to hide as he runs into Madhvi and Sonu at the market.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Madhvi Ki Keemti Saree
desc: Madhvi informs Bhide that her brother, Vinayak, will be coming over with his family. Bhide gets distracted and burns Madhvi's saree by accident.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ko Laga Jhatka
desc: Popatlal gets angry at Bhide for being carefree about the accidents at the Gokuldham Society. How will the members of Gokuldham solve this new issue?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Chappal Exchange
desc: Babita thanks Jethalal for repairing and returning her phone safely. Jethalal argues about exchanging the footwear that Tapu ordered online.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Retrieves Babita's Phone
desc: Jethalal requests Inspector Pandey to drop him, Taarak and Sodhi at Gokuldham Society. Bapuji finds out the story of Jethalal's arrest through Bhide.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal And Gang In Lock-Up
desc: Jethalal, Taarak and Sodhi get locked up in Inspector Pandey's station. They keep requesting Inspector Pandey to show them some leniency.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Arrested
desc: Jethalal, Taarak and Sodhi are arrested by the police and taken to the station. They get happy to see Inspector Pandey on duty but, he refuses to treat their case in a partial manner.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Paise Do Phone Lo
desc: Sodhi gets ready to take on the vasooli agents with Babita's phone. Jethalal sets up a meeting with the agents in the hopes of returning Babita's phone.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ki Deal
desc: Jethalal gets jumped on by other members of Gokuldham for being irresponsible with Babita's phone. Taarak helps Jethalal to set up a meeting with the vasooli agents.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal's Lies Get Caught
desc: Iyer and Babita arrive at Jethalal's godown and find that he has been lying about Babita's phone all along. Jethalal turns to Taarak to help him find a solution.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Retrieving Babita's Phone
desc: Jethalal calls the goon who has Babita's phone and begs him to give the phone back to him. However, the goon doesn't budge and asks for his money. What compromise does Jethalal need to do to get the phone back?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Finding Babita's Phone
desc: Iyer calls Bagha and asks him about Babita's phone. Jethalal calls the vasooli agents and tries to get the phone back.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Searching For Santosh Contractor
desc: Jethalal frantically looks for his contractor Santosh. He ends up calling multiple numbers but fails to get in touch with him. Meanwhile, Babita and Iyer wait for Jethalal to come back with her phone.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ke Office Aye Gunde
desc: The goons, who believe that Jethalal owes them money, reach his office and demand money. Jethalal, still confused, tries to figure out who they are and how does he owe them money.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Se Vasooli
desc: Jethalal sends Bagha to a local mobile repair show for fixing Babita's phone. Bhide has to deal with three guys who are adamant about taking 2 lakh rupees from Jethalal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pyaar Ki Kala
desc: When Bhide finds that Tapu has ordered footwear worth five thousand rupees, he scolds Jethalal for pampering Tapu. Jethalal reaches his shop to find that the contractor hasn't arrived for the meeting.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Iyer Trips And Falls
desc: Taarak asks Jethalal to stay calm and ask his contractor for a deadline. Iyer trips on a banana peel and breaks his cell phone.
